query_title: You Are the Apple of My Eye

recommendations.title: Immortality
recommendations.overview: A vampire in London is searching for the ideal woman to 'redeem' him.

recommendations.title: Dear Ex
recommendations.overview: When Sanlian's ex-husband passes away, she discovers he has altered his insurance policy, cutting out their son in favor of a stranger named Jay.

recommendations.title: Left-Handed Girl
recommendations.overview: A mother and her two daughters move to Taipei to open a noodle stand at a vibrant night market, but family secrets and tradition test their fresh start.

recommendations.title: Fist of Fury
recommendations.overview: During the Japanese occupation of Shanghai, Chen Zhen, the star pupil of a recently-deceased martial arts teacher battles a Japanese dojo which seeks the demise of his fighting school.

recommendations.title: Rascal Does Not Dream of a Dreaming Girl
recommendations.overview: In Fujisawa, Sakuta Azusagawa is in his second year of high school. Blissful days with his girlfriend and upperclassman, Mai Sakurajima, are interrupted by the appearance of his first crush, Shoko Makinohara.

recommendations.title: Cold War II
recommendations.overview: A suspected criminal mastermind escapes from police custody, throwing the city into turmoil. With the police department now divided, rival police chiefs are forced to take their fight to the streets of Hong Kong with deadly consequences.

recommendations.title: Through My Window
recommendations.overview: Raquel's longtime crush on her next-door neighbor turns into something more when he starts developing feelings for her, despite his family's objections.

recommendations.title: Out of Reach
recommendations.overview: Vietnam veteran Billy Ray Lancing, a former CSA agent who now works on a wildlife refuge in Northern Alaska, has been exchanging letters in a pen-pal relationship with Irina Morawska, a 13-year-old orphaned girl in Poland that he's helping out financ

recommendations.title: Forever My Girl
recommendations.overview: After being gone for a decade, a country star returns home to the love he left behind.

recommendations.title: Cold War
